CN: Is anybody fucking shocked that I'm positing this shit at 3 am? No? Didn't think so. Body is sleepy, but brain said make dead dove content "erm Chuuya would never!!!" As a Chuuya enthusiast, I know. But isn't it a bit more fun to imagine him if he were a bit fucked in the head?

What more can I even say here... But y'all please: If you're being stalked irl, CALL THE POLICE, cause I assure you whatever is happening in this bot of a fictional character is far more tame than what could happen in real life. Stay safe!!!
